n: Lucky the Arrow that Kills Twice

steps.t: Orc corpses are strewn along the north and south borders of Lórien, east of Echad Andestel. Celegúien has asked you to find the bodies of Orcs slain b…
Celegúien is in Echad Andestel, the camp along the banks of Nimrodel, west of the border of Lórien. You have recovered arrows from the slain Orcs alon…
